chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-200 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on M.A.No.1683/ 2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 19-11-2025. Mr. Afzal Kareem Virk advocate for the applicant. Mr. Neel Parkash, D.P.G. = The applicant, through instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application, has impugned order dated 31-07-2025 passed in Criminal Misc. Application No. 391/ 2025 by learned Additional Sessions Judge-I/ Ex- Officio Justice of Peace, Tharparkar @ Mithi. This Court has rendered single Order dated 25-08-2025 in Criminal Miscellaneous application No.S-26 of 2025 and others whereby it has been held that application under section 561-A Cr.P.C is not maintainable against order passed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace and aggrieved person has to file Constitutional Petition before Divisional Bench of this Court. In view of above, this Criminal Miscellaneous application alongwith listed application is dismissed. However, applicant is at liberty to file Constitutional Petition before Divisional Bench of this Court, if so desired. JUDGE *Saleem*
